name: KMH Hitech Co., Ltd.
summary: KMH Hitech Co., Ltd. provides semiconductor process materials. Its semiconductor process materials include IC-trays, carrier tapes, module-trays, and wafer ring carriers. The company also offers solid state drives (SSDs), such as SSD enclosures and turnkey boxes. In addition, it provides exterior cases and packaging materials. The company was formerly known as BIEMT Co., Ltd. KMH Hitech Co., Ltd. was founded in 1997 and is based in Asan-si, South Korea.
